recommendations.title: Masquerade
recommendations.overview: Though it places his own life in danger, a look-alike commoner secretly takes the place of a poisoned king to save his country from falling into chaos.

recommendations.title: The Admiral: Roaring Currents
recommendations.overview: Admiral Yi Sun-sin faces a tough challenge when he is forced to defend his nation with just 13 battleships against 300 Japanese enemy ships in the Battle of Myeongryang.

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.

recommendations.title: War of the Arrows
recommendations.overview: After the death of their father, two siblings are raised by their father's best friend. However, when one gets kidnapped just before her wedding, the other rises against the Manchus.

recommendations.title: Special Delivery
recommendations.overview: A black-market cabbie drives criminals at breakneck speeds until she is left in charge of a fugitive's son.

recommendations.title: Guy Ritchie's The Covenant
recommendations.overview: During the war in Afghanistan, a local interpreter risks his own life to carry an injured sergeant across miles of grueling terrain.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Hacksaw Ridge
recommendations.overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

recommendations.title: Tae Guk Gi: The Brotherhood of War
recommendations.overview: When two brothers are forced to fight in the Korean War, the elder decides to take the riskiest missions if it will help shield the younger from battle.

recommendations.title: Noryang: Deadly Sea
